title: trigonotis angustifolia
intro: Trigonotis angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved trigonotis or Chinese trigonotis, is a plant species that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and treating respiratory issues. Trigonotis angustifolia is traditionally prepared as a tea or dried herb for its medicinal use, and its leaves and stems are used to make infusions for various health benefits.
